text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, November 29. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Understood. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Great consistency with running. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. He is doing so well. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Updating our financial spreadsheets. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Smart financial planning. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Understood. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. That sounds critical. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Went for a run around the neighborhood. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. I've logged your vitals. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! Space science and tech is a great focus. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's wonderful. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Updating our financial spreadsheets. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can run some projections for you. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I can help with that. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Made good progress on my work tasks today. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
